1310.reason: The error line number is incorrectly set to the line of the current token (which is the token after the missing ')'), but should be the line of the last non-terminal before the missing ')', which is the line of the function identifier or the last parameter. In the test case "void f(int a {}", the missing ')' is on line 1, but the code reports line 5 because it uses iterator.now_line() after parsing the block, which is wrong.
